human_task_name: SynAIpse CC0: independently confirm the compatibility boundary
objective: Independently verify or correct the preserved CC0 Worker draft, then write a confirmed compatibility brief without changing runtime behavior.

decision_frame.value: Produce the first packet-valid CC0 evidence for the current immutable preservation commit.
decision_frame.why_now: The prior Worker result was correctly blocked because its packet required a clean worktree after uncommitted control artifacts existed.
acceptance_criteria: A confirmed brief maps all relevant producers and readers and selects one versioned failure-envelope representation.
The selected representation preserves contextUnknowns as optional identified ch_context failures only.
The Worker handoff attests instructions and the result validates against this immutable packet.
dependencies: Only declared CC0 control artifacts may make the worktree dirty.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Prevent a control artifact from silently changing a command's worktree authority while preserving its failure evidence.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One confirmed CC0 brief and packet-valid Worker handoff.

non_goals: Do not modify runtime TypeScript, schemas, tests, generated artifacts, commands, packages, or hosted state.
Do not begin CC1 or CC2.
Do not add search, index, memory, persistence, or an alternative command surface.
Do not commit, push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, or alter any other worktree.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Choose bounded read-only investigation order inside CC0.
Write only declared recovery evidence artifacts.
Recommend but do not implement the first CC1 patch.
